CREATE TABLE test_utf8 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name NVARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_utf8 (id, name) VALUES (1, N'正常文字');
INSERT INTO test_utf8 (id, name) VALUES (2, N'🙂😊🚀');
SELECT id, name FROM test_utf8 WHERE name LIKE N'%文%';
CREATE TABLE another_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description NVARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO another_test (id, description) VALUES (1, N'符号与字符');
INSERT INTO another_test (id, description) VALUES (2, N'测试 UTF-8 字符串');
SELECT a.id, a.name, b.description FROM test_utf8 a JOIN another_test b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_utf8 WHERE name = N'正常文字';
SELECT * FROM test_utf8 WHERE name NOT LIKE N'非代表字符%';
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_utf8) AS total_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM another_test) AS another_count;
CREATE TABLE utf8_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, title NVARCHAR(100), content NVARCHAR(MAX));
INSERT INTO utf8_test (id, title, content) VALUES (1, N'标题1', N'包含非ASCII字符: 你好, 世界!');
INSERT INTO utf8_test (id, title, content) VALUES (2, N'标题2', N'Belonging to UTF-8: Gëståł¿');
SELECT id, title, content FROM utf8_test WHERE content LIKE N'%非ASCII%';
SELECT DISTINCT title FROM utf8_test WHERE title COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS = N'标题1';
CREATE TABLE unicode_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data NVARCHAR(512));
INSERT INTO unicode_test (id, data) VALUES (1, N'😊 Test Data 1');
INSERT INTO unicode_test (id, data) VALUES (2, N'Unicode characters: Aéïø');
SELECT data FROM unicode_test WHERE data LIKE N'%Test%';
